chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 217 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 1809/2024 2.For orders on MA 1810/2024 3.For hearing of Bail Application 17-04-2024 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate along with applicants. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Applicants Maqbool Ahmed and Muhammad Ashraf seek protective bail in Crime No.03 of 2024, registered at Police Station, Khenjoo-Ghotki for offence under Sections 302, 311, 148 & 149 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicants are innocent and have falsely been implicated in this case by the complainant; that the applicants are ready to surrender before the trial Court but apprehend their arrest at the hands of police. Hence, they seek protection. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of Seven days is granted to the applicants subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-(Fifty Thousand) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicants surrender before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is made clear that if the applicants failed to surrender before the trial Court in seven days, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
